Cut Energy and Emissions in Heavy Industry

Using software to optimize energy consumption in steel, chemical, and cement industries

Learn More

The Challenge

Steel, chemical, and cement industries are among the largest energy consumers globally. These sectors face increasing pressure to reduce both operational costs and carbon emissions. Traditional monitoring approaches often miss optimization opportunities that software-based condition monitoring can reveal.

The Solution

Samotics provides AI-based condition monitoring through Electrical Signature Analysis (ESA). Our technology continuously analyzes electrical signals from motors and drives to identify:

  • Energy inefficiencies and wasteful consumption patterns
  • Equipment degradation before failure occurs
  • Opportunities for process optimization
  • Peak load management strategies

Real-World Impact

By implementing condition monitoring, heavy industries have achieved:

  • 5-15% reduction in energy consumption
  • Extended equipment lifespan through predictive maintenance
  • Reduced unplanned downtime and production losses
  • Measurable reduction in carbon footprint

Getting Started

Samotics works with industrial operators to deploy condition monitoring systems that fit seamlessly into existing operations. Our approach focuses on quick implementation and immediate visibility into energy and equipment performance.
